title: Glossy Spicy Tunisian Chicken Stir Fry
description: A tangy and spicy Tunisian dish featuring chicken, paella rice, and a glassy jelly sauce, perfect for a sick day or a low carb friendly meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the harissa paste to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the paella rice to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, lemon juice, and pomegranate molasses to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until the rice is tender.
Stir in the salt and black pepper.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
